zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie於1225年出生在英國蘇格蘭班福爾卡倫時，他的父親Roger de Berkeley46歲，母親Margaret de Marshal36歲。他於1255年與Bissett在英國蘇格蘭班福爾卡倫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1298年之後。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie was born in 1225, in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Berkeley, was 46 and his mother, Margaret de Marshal, was 36. He married Bissett in 1255, in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1298.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie est né en 1225, à Cullen, Banffshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Berkeley, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Marshal, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Bissett en 1255, à Cullen, Banffshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1298.

Er hat 1255 in Cullen, Banffshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Bissett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1298.

ko.Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, Unit: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 피른
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Berkeley 6th Laird of Towie(이)가 1225년 영국 스코틀랜드 반프실르 컬렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Berkeley(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Marshal(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1255년 영국 스코틀랜드 반프실르 컬렌에서 Bissett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1298년 이후 사망했다.
